contents: (** This file develops [Isomorphic], [≅]. See ua_homomorphism.v for

(** Two algebras [A B : Algebra σ] are isomorphic if there is an
    isomorphism [∀ s, A s → B s]. *)

Record Isomorphic {σ : Signature} (A B : Algebra σ) := BuildIsomorphic
  { def_isomorphic : ∀ s, A s → B s
  ; is_homomorphism_isomorphic :: IsHomomorphism def_isomorphic
  ; is_isomorphism_isomorphic :: IsIsomorphism def_isomorphic }.
Global Notation "A ≅ B" := (Isomorphic A B) : Algebra_scope.

Definition SigIsomorphic {σ : Signature} (A B : Algebra σ) :=
  { def_iso : ∀ s, A s → B s
  | { _ : IsHomomorphism def_iso | IsIsomorphism def_iso }}.

Lemma issig_isomorphic {σ : Signature} (A B : Algebra σ)
  : SigIsomorphic A B <~> A ≅ B.
(** Isomorphic algebras can be identified [A ≅ B → A = B]. *)

Corollary id_isomorphic `{Univalence} {σ} {A B : Algebra σ} (e : A ≅ B)
  : A = B.
(** Identified algebras are isomorphic [A = B → A ≅ B] *)
Lemma isomorphic_id {σ} {A B : Algebra σ} (p : A = B) : A ≅ B.

(** To find a path between two witnesses [F G : A ≅ B], it suffices
    to find a path between the defining families of functions and
    the [is_homomorphism_hom] witnesses. *)

Lemma path_isomorphic `{Funext} {σ : Signature} {A B : Algebra σ}
  (F G : A ≅ B) (a : def_isomorphic F = def_isomorphic G)
  (b : a#(is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) = is_homomorphism_isomorphic G)
  : F = G.

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

goals.conclusion: (issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F = (issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 G

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

goals.conclusion: ((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).1 = ((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 G).1

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (λ def_iso : forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s,
   {H0 : IsHomomorphism def_iso & IsIsomorphism def_iso})
  ?p ((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).2 =
((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 G).2

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

goals.conclusion: ((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).1 = ((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 G).1

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

goals.conclusion:
transport
  (λ def_iso : forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s,
   {H0 : IsHomomorphism def_iso & IsIsomorphism def_iso})
  a ((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).2 =
((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 G).2

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

goals.conclusion:
(transport
   (λ def_iso : forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s,
    {H0 : IsHomomorphism def_iso & IsIsomorphism def_iso})
   a ((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).2).1 =
(((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 G).2).1

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

goals.conclusion:
(transport IsHomomorphism a (((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).2).1;
transportD IsHomomorphism IsIsomorphism a (((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).2).1
  (((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 F).2).2).1 =
(((issig_isomorphic A B)^-1 G).2).1

hypotheses.type:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

contents:
(** Suppose [IsHSetAlgebra B]. To find a path between two isomorphic
    witnesses [F G : A ≅ B], it suffices to find a path between the
    defining families of functions. *)

Lemma path_hset_isomorphic `{Funext} {σ : Signature} {A B : Algebra σ}
  `{IsHSetAlgebra B} (F G : A ≅ B)
  (a : def_isomorphic F = def_isomorphic G)
  : F = G.

goals.conclusion:
transport IsHomomorphism a (is_homomorphism_isomorphic F) =
is_homomorphism_isomorphic G

contents:
Lemma path_def_isomorphic_id_transport_dom (p : A = B)
    : def_isomorphic (isomorphic_id p)
      = transport (λ C, ∀ s, C s → B s) (ap carriers p)^ (hom_id B).

goals.conclusion:
def_isomorphic (isomorphic_id p) =
transport (λ C : Carriers σ, forall s : Sort σ, C s -> B s) 
  (ap carriers p)^ (hom_id B)

def_isomorphic (isomorphic_id p) =
transport (λ C : Carriers σ, forall s : Sort σ, C s -> B s) 
  (ap carriers p)^ (hom_id B)

contents:
Lemma path_def_isomorphic_id_transport_cod (p : A = B)
    : def_isomorphic (isomorphic_id p)
      = transport (λ C, ∀ s, A s → C s) (ap carriers p) (hom_id A).

goals.conclusion:
def_isomorphic (isomorphic_id p) =
transport (λ C : Carriers σ, forall s : Sort σ, A s -> C s) 
  (ap carriers p) (hom_id A)

def_isomorphic (isomorphic_id p) =
transport (λ C : Carriers σ, forall s : Sort σ, A s -> C s) 
  (ap carriers p) (hom_id A)

contents:
(** If [IsHSetAlgebra A], then [path_isomorphism] maps the identity
    homomorphism of [A] to the identity path. *)

(* I suspect that the following lemma holds even when [A] is not a set
   algebra. To show this, [path_isomorphism] and [path_operations_equiv]
   should be made transparent, which they are not at the moment. *)

goals.conclusion:
path_forall A A
  (λ i : Sort σ, path_universe (equiv_isomorphism (hom_id A) i)) =
ap carriers 1

contents: apply (paths_ind (λ s, idpath) (λ f _, path_forall A A f = idpath)).

goals.conclusion: path_forall A A (λ s : Sort σ, 1) = 1

(λ s : Sort σ, 1) =
(λ i : Sort σ, path_universe (equiv_isomorphism (hom_id A) i))
path_forall A A (λ s : Sort σ, 1) = 1

(λ s : Sort σ, 1) =
(λ i : Sort σ, path_universe (equiv_isomorphism (hom_id A) i))

(λ s : Sort σ, 1) =
(λ i : Sort σ, path_universe (equiv_isomorphism (hom_id A) i))

contents:
(** The following section shows that [isomorphic_id] is an equivalence
    with inverse [id_isomorphic]. *)
Lemma sect_id_isomorphic : (@isomorphic_id σ A B) o id_isomorphic == idmap.

goals.conclusion:
transport (λ C : Carriers σ, forall s : Sort σ, A s -> C s)
  (ap carriers (id_isomorphic F)) (hom_id A) =
def_isomorphic F

transport (λ C : Carriers σ, forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> C s0)
  (ap carriers (id_isomorphic F)) (hom_id A) s x =
def_isomorphic F s x

transport (λ x0 : Carriers σ, x0 s) (ap carriers (id_isomorphic F))
  (hom_id A s x) =
def_isomorphic F s x

transport (λ x0 : Carriers σ, x0 s)
  (path_forall A B
     (λ i : Sort σ, path_universe (equiv_isomorphism (def_isomorphic F) i)))
  (hom_id A s x) =
def_isomorphic F s x

transport idmap (path_universe (equiv_isomorphism (def_isomorphic F) s))
  (hom_id A s x) =
def_isomorphic F s x

contents: Lemma sect_isomorphic_id : id_isomorphic o (@isomorphic_id σ A B) == idmap.

#[export] Instance isequiv_isomorphic_id : IsEquiv (@isomorphic_id σ A B)
    := isequiv_adjointify
          isomorphic_id
          id_isomorphic
          sect_id_isomorphic
          sect_isomorphic_id.
